  • local.alejandrogb.metricsservers.utils.SqlQueries
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DELETE_PRM_GLOBAL_BY_GROUP
    "DELETE FROM grupo_permiso_global WHERE grupoId = ?"
    public static final String
    DELETE_PRM_SECCN_BY_GROUP
    "DELETE FROM grupo_seccion WHERE grupoId = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_AMBT
    "SELECT * FROM ambitos"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_AMBT_BY_ID
    "SELECT * FROM ambitos WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_GROUP
    "SELECT * FROM grupos"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_GROUP_BY_ID
    "SELECT * FROM grupos WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_PRM
    "SELECT p.id as p_id, p.nombre as p_nombre, p.descripcion as p_descripcion,\n\t\ta.id as a_id, a.nombre as a_nombre, a.descripcion as a_descripcion\nFROM permisos p\nJOIN ambitos a ON p.ambitoId = a.id\nORDER BY a.nombre, p.nombre\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_PRM_BY_ID
    "SELECT p.id as p_id, p.nombre as p_nombre, p.descripcion as p_descripcion,\n\t\ta.id as a_id, a.nombre as a_nombre, a.descripcion as a_descripcion\nFROM permisos p\nJOIN ambitos a ON p.ambitoId = a.id\nWHERE p.id = ?\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SECCN
    "SELECT * FROM secciones"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SECCN_BY_ID
    "SELECT * FROM secciones WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SERV
    "SELECT s.*,\n sec.id AS sec_id,\n sec.nombre AS sec_nombre,\n sec.descripcion AS sec_desc,\n srv.id AS servicio_id,\n srv.nombre AS servicio_nombre\nFROM servidores s\nLEFT JOIN secciones sec ON sec.id = s.seccionId\nLEFT JOIN servidores_servicios ss ON ss.servidorId = s.id\nLEFT JOIN servicios srv ON srv.id = ss.servicioId\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SERV_BY_ID
    "SELECT s.*,\n sec.id AS sec_id,\n sec.nombre AS sec_nombre,\n sec.descripcion AS sec_desc,\n srv.id AS servicio_id,\n srv.nombre AS servicio_nombre\nFROM servidores s\nLEFT JOIN secciones sec ON sec.id = s.seccionId\nLEFT JOIN servidores_servicios ss ON ss.servidorId = s.id\nLEFT JOIN servicios srv ON srv.id = ss.servicioId\nWHERE s.id = ?\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SRV
    "SELECT * FROM servicios"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_SRV_BY_ID
    "SELECT * FROM servicios WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_USER
    "SELECT * FROM usuarios"
    public static final String
    FIND_FULL_USER_BY_ID
    "SELECT * FROM usuarios WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_PRM_GLOBAL_BY_GROUPID_ID
    "SELECT permisoId FROM grupo_permiso_global WHERE grupoId = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_PRM_GLOBAL_BY_GROUPID_NAME
    "SELECT CONCAT(p.nombre, \'_\', a.nombre) as pkey\nFROM grupo_permiso_global gpg\n JOIN permisos p ON gpg.permisoId = p.id\n JOIN ambitos a ON p.ambitoId = a.id\nWHERE gpg.grupoId = ?\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_PRM_SECCN_BY_GROUPID_ID
    "SELECT seccionId, permisoId FROM grupo_seccion WHERE grupoId = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_PRM_SECCN_BY_GROUPID_NAME
    "SELECT gs.seccionId,\n CONCAT(p.nombre, \'_\', a.nombre) as pkey\nFROM grupo_seccion gs\nJOIN permisos p ON gs.permisoId = p.id\nJOIN ambitos a ON p.ambitoId = a.id\nWHERE gs.grupoId = ?\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_PRMID_BY_KEY
    "SELECT p.id FROM permisos p\nJOIN ambitos a ON p.ambitoId = a.id\nWHERE p.nombre = ? AND a.nombre = ?\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_SERVERID_SERV
    "SELECT serverId FROM servidores WHERE id = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_TOKENS_BY_USUARIOID
    "SELECT * FROM api_tokens WHERE usuarioId = ?"
    public static final String
    FIND_USER_GROUP_AUTH
    "SELECT u.username, u.nombre, u.apel1, u.apel2, u.active,\n g.id as gid, g.nombre as gnombre, g.superadmin\n FROM usuarios u\n JOIN api_tokens t ON u.id = t.usuarioId\n JOIN grupos g ON u.grupoId = g.id\n WHERE t.token = ? AND t.active = 1\n"
    public static final String
    FIND_USERNAME_USER
    "SELECT username FROM usuarios WHERE username LIKE ?"
    public static final String
    INSERT_PRM_GLOBAL_BY_GROUP
    "INSERT INTO grupo_permiso_global (grupoId, permisoId) VALUES (?, ?)"
    public static final String
    INSERT_PRM_SECCN_BY_GROUP
    "INSERT INTO grupo_seccion (grupoId, seccionId, permisoId) VALUES (?, ?, ?)"
